local_updates: Shucked opens May 12 at Civic Center and runs through May 17.
OU Commencement ceremonies create Norman family traffic and hotel movement throughout the week.
Calderón Dance Festival runs May 16 from 12 PM–8 PM at Myriad Botanical Gardens.
George Thorogood & The Destroyers with The Marshall Tucker Band hits Riverwind May 16 at 7 PM.
Thunder playoff watch-party traffic continues depending on series length.
Comets have a Sunday home game May 10 before heading on the road.
